coachAM: Your scattered focus, evident in the journal's "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" and the direct correlation to abysmal sleep and training numbers, reveals a founder operating on fumes, chasing external validation instead of internal discipline. The root cause is a fundamental breakdown in self-governance and commitment to your foundational protocols, which directly destabilizes the physical and mental bedrock necessary for elite execution and spiritual alignment, ultimately eroding your capacity to lead and deliver on the vision God has given you. Today, before anything else, block out 9:30 PM for absolute lights-out and 4:30 AM for rise, setting a non-negotiable hard stop on all inputs.
